channel.title: Backstack on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Backstack on Make Things Happen

item.title: Android navigation library and TransactionTooLargeException
item.description: Let’s admit - the Android navigation library is a really cool thing but it has its own issues and drawbacks. One of the issues you can have is the TransactionTooLargeException. And here is how it happens.
